{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Iri
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Iri]] is a member of the [[Vroshir]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
